creator: freebsd-ports@bluepex.com
text:
On 07/09/09 Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of net/p5-Daemon-Generic,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/136548 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/136548
> 

Approved.
